scope: Fidelity review anchored this bundle to the legacy Go connector's emitted data. Legacy reads two endpoints, GET /v1/stats and GET /v1/accounts, extracts top-level data arrays, and emits each record verbatim after filling a missing id from bucket/date/stream. The newer documented standalone utilization endpoints return a different envelope and PascalCase field names; wiring them into these legacy stream names would change emitted record data, so they are not substituted here.

excluded.reason: newer documented account-utilization endpoint with a PageInfo/Records envelope and PascalCase fields; substituting it would diverge from legacy account_stats data
newer documented bucket-utilization endpoint with PascalCase fields; substituting it would diverge from legacy bucket_stats data
single-bucket lookup for the newer standalone-utilization surface; not part of the legacy data contract for this stream
single-bucket lookup for the newer standalone-utilization surface; not part of the legacy data contract for this stream
Control-Account/Sub-Account aggregate utilization endpoint requiring Wasabi Account Control partner credentials, a distinct auth scope from this connector's standalone-account credential
